; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
; Modified: 2026-03-03T01:12:56Z

AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[17550284043068430536]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&233703556595635&~.~&16254972084332612587&~ }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&7712934851008712&~.~&14140055321554169705&~(~&254543134825829310&~) }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
